steps.title: Inspect project state
steps.expected: Project state reports git, evals, dashboard health, memory, and approvals.

rollback.description: No rollback is required. This step only reads local state.

steps.title: Run deterministic evals
steps.expected: All eval definitions pass and latest report is persisted.

rollback.description: If eval output changes, inspect .sage-kernel/evals/latest.json and rerun after fixing the failing grader.
Do not package or publish. Fix the failed release gate and rerun this step.
